subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards God! Give thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Merciful, that the morning breeze hath wafted over thee from the gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی الله اشکر ربک الرحمن بما مرت علیک نسمه الاسحار من ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Imam 'Ali, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
